# YENAAN

> YENAAN is a Korean skincare brand house offering its skincare brands and finished products for international wholesale and distribution. Its current portfolio includes m'Aaile, with REVITAL, REVIVE and FOR HOMME collections.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://yenaan.com/): Korean skincare brands for global distribution
- [m'Aaile](https://yenaan.com/brands/maaile/): ampoule-based Korean skincare brand (REVITAL, REVIVE, FOR HOMME)
- [Partnership](https://yenaan.com/partnership/): wholesale and distribution partnership for importers, distributors and retailers
- [Catalogue](https://yenaan.com/catalogue/): m'Aaile product catalogue (PDF)
- [FAQ](https://yenaan.com/faq/): distribution and wholesale questions
- [Contact](https://yenaan.com/contact/): partnership inquiry form

## Notes
- Wholesale pricing, MOQ and lead times are confirmed per order after a partnership inquiry.
- Certifications are planned per target market.
